title: fam-exp-reduce — exp's argument RANGE REDUCTION as Form->asm BYTES: the FIRST composed transcendental step on the native asm lane, four-way + run bit-exact on the M4
author: Sema (Opus 4.8), autonomous native-ML walk
stone: Every exp-lane PRIMITIVE was proven four-way as a standalone <=6-instruction program ending in ret — fam-frintn (round-to-nearest-even, the range-reduction rounding), fam-fmov-bits/fa-fmov-d-x (#3933, the 2^k bit-reinterpret keystone), fam-horner2 (the Horner poly engine), fam-pool-fma/exp-coef-pool (the pooled ln2/log2e). But NONE composed. fam-exp-reduce is the FIRST COMPOSED transcendental step: it CHAINS a materialized constant + fmul + frintn + fmadd into a real function x -> r = x - round(x*log2e)*ln2. exp(x) = 2^k*exp(r) with k = round(x*log2e) and r in [-ln2/2, ln2/2] (the interval a short Horner exp poly converges over); this emits the k-and-r half, the precondition of the whole exp/softmax/gelu lane. Advances form-native-models.form 'GAPS - LLM INFERENCE' note 'the nonlinear ops as form-asm bytes (exp/sin/cos/rsqrt for softmax/RoPE/RMSNorm/SwiGLU)'. First CONSUMER of fam-fmov-bits' fa-fmov-d-x (#3933, 'the last missing piece of the exp lane') and of the new fa-mov-imm64.
new_encoders: form/form-stdlib/form-asm.fk :: fa-movk-x (rd imm hw) — movk x<rd>,#imm16,lsl#(16*hw), the SHIFT as DATA (base 0xF2800000 | hw<<21 | imm<<5 | rd). One encoder for all four halfword positions, so a full 64-bit immediate is 4 rows not 4 near-duplicate encoders (core-abstraction-first); fa-movk-x-16 is exactly the hw=1 case (no parallel path, proven by band claim 16).

form/form-stdlib/form-asm.fk :: fa-mov-imm64 (rd bs) — materialize a full 64-bit constant (its 8 little-endian bytes from f64-bytes) into x<rd> as movz + 3 movk. The way clang -O2 INLINES an f64 constant when it does NOT pool it: build the IEEE754 bit pattern in a GP register, then fa-fmov-d-x reinterprets those bits as the f64. The reusable companion to fa-fmov-d-x for every inlined float constant (exp's ln2/log2e, RoPE base, poly coeffs) AND the 2^k/ldexp step ((k+1023)<<52 then fmov d,x). Emits the full 4-move form (byte-identical to clang for any all-nonzero-halfword constant; the transcendental constants are all nonzero-halfword; a zero-halfword skip is a named follow-up, not needed here).
recipe: form/form-stdlib/form-asm-matvec.fk :: fam-exp-reduce — 14 arm64 instructions / 56 bytes. ABI: d0 = x, returns d0 = r. Program: fa-mov-imm64(8, f64-bytes log2e); fa-fmov-d-x(1,8) [d1=log2e]; fa-fmul(1,0,1) [d1=x*log2e]; fa-frintn(1,1) [d1=k=round]; fa-mov-imm64(8, f64-bytes -ln2); fa-fmov-d-x(2,8) [d2=-ln2]; fa-fmadd(0,1,2,0) [d0=k*(-ln2)+x=x-k*ln2=r]; ret. clang -O2 does NOT pool these two constants — it materializes each f64 with movz+3movk then fmov d,x, so the byte-exact path is mov-imm64 -> fmov-d-x, not a literal pool. Pooling -ln2 lets the reduction use the already-proven fa-fmadd rather than a new fmsub encoder.

four_way.claims: 1 len==56 (14 instr)  +2 FULL 56-byte program byte-equals the clang -O2 oracle (fa-conviction)  +4 fa-mov-imm64 builds log2e's 16-byte movz+3movk (all four halfwords)  +8 fa-mov-imm64 builds -ln2's 16-byte image (the SIGN bit flows through f64-bytes)  +16 the generic fa-movk-x at hw=1 IS fa-movk-x-16 (shift as DATA, no parallel path)
four_way.result: Go = Rust = TS = fkwu = 31, 0 divergent. fourth arm: 1 band four-way (fkwu + pre-flattened tables).
four_way.reproduce: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/format-arith.fk form-stdlib/f64-bytes.fk form-stdlib/form-asm.fk form-stdlib/form-asm-matvec.fk form-stdlib/tests/form-asm-exp-reduce-band.fk

oracle: clang -O2 -c -target arm64-apple-macos + otool -tvVj of `double reduce(double x){ double k=__builtin_roundeven(x*0x1.71547652b82fep0); return __builtin_fma(k,-0x1.62e42fefa39efp-1,x); }` — 14 instructions, 56 bytes: mov/movk x8 (log2e) ; fmov d1,x8 ; fmul d1,d0,d1 ; frintn d1,d1 ; mov/movk x8 (-ln2) ; fmov d2,x8 ; fmadd d0,d1,d2,d0 ; ret. The Form emitter reproduces all 56 bytes byte-for-byte.

on_m4.path: Form emits fam-exp-reduce's 56 bytes -> form-macho mo-object-sym wraps a Mach-O .o exporting _recipe -> ld -dylib + ad-hoc sign (recipe-dylib path, no clang in the compute) -> a dumb C harness dlopens it, casts _recipe to double recipe(double x), calls with real scalars.
on_m4.reference: recipe(x) == __builtin_fma(__builtin_roundeven(x*log2e), -ln2, x) — the SAME fmul/roundeven/fma the recipe folds, so == not epsilon. Also asserts the reduction INVARIANT |r| <= ln2/2.
on_m4.result: arm64 macOS M4 Max: 9/9 real inputs MATCH bit-for-bit AND satisfy |r|<=ln2/2. x=0->r=0; x=ln2->k=1,r=0; x=1->r=0.30685281944005471; x=0.5->k=1,r=-0.19314718...; x=2->k=3,r=-0.07944154...; x=10->k=14; x=-1->k=-1; x=88->k=127 (near float exp overflow); x=-87->k=-126. The range reduction is sovereign native bytes.

lane: NEW-encoders + first-composition brick, ~40m. Design (getting clang's exact mov/movk materialization shape via otool as ground truth, the fa-movk-x shift-as-data generalization, fa-mov-imm64 as the reusable 64-bit-constant primitive, the fmadd-with-pooled-(-ln2) trick to avoid a new fmsub encoder, the strange-minimal band claims isolating each new piece) was the cost; both proofs were seconds. The clang -O2 disassembly IS the oracle (strongest conviction: byte-identity to the real compiler, then drop it — the lane's ethos).
read_the_body: Every exp-lane primitive was already four-way (frintn, fmov-d-x, horner, pooled constants) — the gap was the COMPOSITION into a real reduction and the constant-MATERIALIZATION primitive clang uses (mov/movk, not a pool). Both genuine. fa-mov-imm64 is also exactly what the 2^k step needs next ((k+1023)<<52 then fmov-d-x).
next_stones: 2^k / ldexp as Form->asm bytes: fcvtzs k(float)->int, fa-add-x-imm +1023, shift <<52 (fa-mov-imm64 already materializes; a shift-left encoder or repeated add is the piece), fa-fmov-d-x bits->f64 = 2^k. fa-mov-imm64 + fa-fmov-d-x from THIS brick are the constant/reinterpret half.
exp(r) Horner poly on the reduced r: chain fam-horner2's fmadds over the pooled exp Taylor coefficients (exp-coef-pool already carries the constants) — the exp(r) half.

compose the FULL exp(x) = 2^k * exp(r) from fam-exp-reduce (this brick) + 2^k + Horner(r) as one Form->asm function, four-way + bit-exact on the M4 vs libm exp — the sovereign-native transcendental that replaces libm/clang for softmax/RoPE/RMSNorm/SwiGLU.
sin/cos range reduction reuses the same shape (k = round(x/(pi/2)), r = x - k*pi/2) — fa-mov-imm64 + fa-frintn + fa-fmadd carry it.
